title: woodsia oregana f. oregana
intro: Woodsia oregana f. oregana, also known as the Oregon cliff brake fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. The medicinal properties of Woodsia oregana f. oregana include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Woodsia oregana f. oregana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
